tasks.label: Package VideoGlitcher (macOS app)
tasks.command: rm -rf dist/package-input dist/VideoGlitcher.app && mkdir -p dist/package-input && jar --create --file dist/package-input/VideoGlitcher.jar -C bin . && cp lib/core.jar dist/package-input/ && cp lib/controlP5/library/*.jar dist/package-input/ && cp lib/processing-opengl/library/*.jar dist/package-input/ && cp lib/videoExport/library/*.jar dist/package-input/ && cp lib/video/library/*.jar dist/package-input/ && cp -R lib/video/library/macos-aarch64 dist/package-input/video-macos-aarch64 && jpackage --type app-image --name VideoGlitcher --dest dist --input dist/package-input --main-jar VideoGlitcher.jar --main-class tom.videoGlitcher.VideoGlitcher --java-options "-Dgstreamer.library.path=\$APPDIR/Contents/app/video-macos-aarch64" --java-options "-Dgstreamer.plugin.path=\$APPDIR/Contents/app/video-macos-aarch64/gstreamer-1.0"

tasks.label: Package VideoGlitcher (portable zip)
tasks.command: rm -rf dist/package-input dist/portable dist/VideoGlitcher-portable.zip && mkdir -p dist/portable/VideoGlitcher/lib dist/portable/VideoGlitcher/video && jar --create --file dist/portable/VideoGlitcher/VideoGlitcher.jar -C bin . && cp lib/core.jar dist/portable/VideoGlitcher/lib/ && cp lib/controlP5/library/*.jar dist/portable/VideoGlitcher/lib/ && cp lib/processing-opengl/library/*.jar dist/portable/VideoGlitcher/lib/ && cp lib/videoExport/library/*.jar dist/portable/VideoGlitcher/lib/ && cp lib/video/library/*.jar dist/portable/VideoGlitcher/lib/ && cp -R lib/video/library/linux-amd64 dist/portable/VideoGlitcher/video/ && cp -R lib/video/library/macos-aarch64 dist/portable/VideoGlitcher/video/ && cp -R lib/video/library/macos-x86_64 dist/portable/VideoGlitcher/video/ && cp -R lib/video/library/windows-amd64 dist/portable/VideoGlitcher/video/ && cp packaging/portable/run-macos.sh dist/portable/VideoGlitcher/ && cp packaging/portable/run-linux.sh dist/portable/VideoGlitcher/ && cp packaging/portable/run-windows.bat dist/portable/VideoGlitcher/ && chmod +x dist/portable/VideoGlitcher/run-macos.sh dist/portable/VideoGlitcher/run-linux.sh && cd dist/portable && zip -r ../VideoGlitcher-portable.zip VideoGlitcher
